title: Chapter 2: The Beautiful Lie
summary: A longer Chapter 2 route for players who finished Chapter 1 on the Control Path. Lattice remains orderly, but Mira's usefulness makes her dangerous to the people who taught her obedience.
designNotes: Target 15 to 20 minutes for a first playthrough.
Carry forward controlIndex, stability, and any private doubt created in Chapter 1.
Use prior choices to decide whether Soren is hidden, marked, or nearly erased.
Cache this pack only when the player has earned control-path and is approaching Chapter 2.
